line_items.label: Revenue
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:Revenues which represents the total net revenue for the periods.

line_items.label: Cost of revenue
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:CostOfRevenue which includes the costs associated with wafer fabrication, assembly, testing and packaging.

line_items.label: Gross profit
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:GrossProfit as the difference between total revenue and cost of revenue.

line_items.label: Operating expenses
line_items.mapping_reason: Header for the operating expenses section.

line_items.label: Research and development
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense representing internal development costs.

line_items.label: Sales, general and administrative
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:SellingGeneralAndAdministrativeExpense for marketing and administrative personnel.

line_items.label: Total operating expenses
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:OperatingExpenses as the sum of R and D and SG and A.

line_items.label: Operating income
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss representing income from core business operations.

line_items.label: Interest income
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest for interest earned on cash and marketable securities.

line_items.label: Interest expense
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating representing interest paid on debt. XBRL uses a positive debit value.

line_items.label: Other income (expense), net
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:OtherNonoperatingIncomeExpense which includes gains/losses on investments.

line_items.label: Total other income (expense), net
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:NonoperatingIncomeExpense as the subtotal of interest income, interest expense, and other net items.

line_items.label: Income tax expense
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit representing the quarterly tax provision.

line_items.label: Net income
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss as the final bottom line.

formulas.formula: Revenue - Cost of revenue = Gross profit
Research and development + Sales, general and administrative = Total operating expenses
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative

formulas.formula: Gross profit - Total operating expenses = Operating income
Interest income - Interest expense + Other income (expense), net = Total other income (expense), net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other income (expense), net

formulas.formula: Operating income + Total other income (expense), net = Income before income tax
formulas.operation: Operating income + Total other income (expense), net

formulas.formula: Income before income tax - Income tax expense = Net income
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: Appears on the Statement of Comprehensive Income, not the Income Statement.
Tax rate disclosure found in Note 4.

line_items.label: Cash and cash equivalents
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue representing highly liquid holdings.

line_items.label: Marketable securities
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent for short-term debt and equity investments.

line_items.label: Accounts receivable, net
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent representing trade receivables less allowances.

line_items.label: Inventories
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:InventoryNet for raw materials, WIP, and finished goods.

line_items.label: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
Total current assets
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:AssetsCurrent as the subtotal of current items.

line_items.label: Total assets
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:Assets as total company resources.

line_items.label: Total liabilities
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:Liabilities as the sum of all debt and obligations.

formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets = Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets = Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities = Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities = Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings = Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities + Total shareholders equity = Total liabilities and shareholders equity

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: Outstanding shares as of a subsequent date, usually on the cover page.
Remaining repurchase authorization found in Note 12.

line_items.label: Net income
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss starting the operating activities section.

line_items.label: (Gains) losses on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments. XBRL value 175 in 2025 is a loss, -69 in 2024 is a gain.

line_items.label: Other
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:OtherNoncashIncomeExpense. Note: HTML shows these as negative adjustments in 2025.

line_items.label: Accounts receivable
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:IncreaseDecreaseInAccountsReceivable. Negative XBRL value means decrease in AR is a source of cash.

line_items.label: Inventories
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:IncreaseDecreaseInInventories. Positive XBRL value means increase in inventory is a use of cash.

line_items.label: Net cash provided by operating activities
Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in investing activities
Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to employee stock plan taxes
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalents at start of period.

line_items.label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
line_items.mapping_reason: Matched to us-gaap:CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalents at end of period.

formulas.formula: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - (Gains) losses on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net + Deferred income taxes + Other + Accounts receivable + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities = Net cash provided by operating activities
components: (Gains) losses on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - (Gains) losses on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net + Deferred income taxes + Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Purchases of non-marketable equity securities - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired = Net cash used in investing activities
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Purchases of non-marketable equity securities - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to employee stock plan taxes - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets = Net cash used in financing activities
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to employee stock plan taxes
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to employee stock plan taxes - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities = Change in cash and cash equivalents
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash and cash equivalents

formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period + Change in cash and cash equivalents = Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
components: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period + Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.result_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: Supplemental cash flow information in Note 14.

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income on CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS (current period)
Beginning cash on CF matches Cash on BS (prior period)
Retained earnings change on BS matches Net income less Dividends and Share Repurchases
cross_statement_checks.details: Change in Retained Earnings (72158 - 68038 = 4120) matches Net Income (18775) minus Dividends (244) minus the portion of share repurchases attributed to Retained Earnings (14411 from the Statement of Shareholders Equity). Calculation: 18775 - 244 - 14411 = 4120.

formula_checks.formula: Revenue - Cost of revenue = Gross profit
Research and development + Sales, general and administrative = Total operating expenses
Gross profit - Total operating expenses = Operating income
Interest income - Interest expense + Other income (expense), net = Total other income (expense), net
Operating income + Total other income (expense), net = Income before income tax
Income before income tax - Income tax expense = Net income
Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets = Total current assets
Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets = Total assets
Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities = Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities = Total liabilities
Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings = Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities + Total shareholders equity = Total liabilities and shareholders equity

Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - (Gains) losses on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net + Deferred income taxes + Other + Accounts receivable + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities = Net cash provided by operating activities

Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Purchases of non-marketable equity securities - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired = Net cash used in investing activities

Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to employee stock plan taxes - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets = Net cash used in financing activities
Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities = Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period + Change in cash and cash equivalents = Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
